data.narrative: Juliette is a 24-year-old female working as a craft or trades worker. They have secondary or less level education and good health. They live as: couple with children. They own a car.

encounters.contact_narrative: Nicolas is a 35-year-old male working as a clerical support worker. They have bachelor level education and good health. They live as: couple with children. They own a car and a bike.
